title: malus sieboldii
intro: Malus sieboldii, also known as Siebold's crabapple or Korean crabapple, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malus sieboldii include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. Malus sieboldii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional cooking and as a food ingredient.
